scripts.docker:build:prod: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const v=require('./package.json').version; execSync(`docker build --build-arg APP_ENV=production --build-arg NODE_HEAP_MB=2048 -t smartnafta/brsm.bolt.front:${v} .`, {stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.docker:build:dev: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const v=require('./package.json').version; execSync(`docker build --build-arg APP_ENV=development --build-arg NODE_HEAP_MB=4096 -t smartnafta/brsm.bolt.front:${v}-dev .`, {stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.docker:push:prod: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const v=require('./package.json').version; execSync(`docker push smartnafta/brsm.bolt.front:${v}`, {stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.docker:push:dev: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const v=require('./package.json').version; execSync(`docker push smartnafta/brsm.bolt.front:${v}-dev`, {stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.docker:release:prod: npm run docker:build:prod && npm run docker:push:prod
scripts.docker:release:dev: npm run docker:build:dev && npm run docker:push:dev
